meaning: adj.无礼貌的,撒野的,粗鲁的adv.没礼貌地,粗野地
examples: "What does this unmannerly boy mean", asked Mr.
This is an issue that has the life on the line of one of their members. How can they show such unmannerly acts in a time of crisis?
A stranger is a stranger, be he rich or poor: it will not suit me to permit anyone the range of the place while I am off guard! 'said the unmannerly wretch.
